description_long: This is a modern apartment building with a rectangular footprint, featuring four stories and a flat roof with green rooftop sections. The facade is predominantly white with large, regularly spaced windows and several balconies on each floor, providing outdoor space for residents. The building is connected to a large, adjacent parking lot with clearly marked spaces, accessible via a short walkway. Small trees and landscaping elements are placed around the perimeter, adding greenery to the urban setting. The main entrance is centrally located and covered, leading directly from the parking area. The overall design is clean and functional, with a focus on symmetry and accessibility.
description: A four-story modern apartment building with balconies, large windows, and a flat green roof, connected to a spacious parking lot and surrounded by landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, balconies, and a tree-lined facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the building's depth, rooftop greenery, and the full length of the parking lot.
description_view_2: Rear view with a direct perspective of the parking lot, entrance, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the building's side profile, rooftop, and parking lot extension.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are symmetrically arranged in vertical columns, evenly spaced across each floor, with consistent alignment and grouping on all visible facades.
